title: RESTful API
description: RESTful API documents overview material for RESTful API in the protocol domain. It is classified as a specification page for the api-spec class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights RESTREpresentational State Transfer, URIUniform Resource Identifiers, URI path, URI query, and HTTP Verb, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include restful-api, and protocol, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is protocol / restful-api / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
